caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is seated in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. A white mannequin stands behind him. He is speaking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. Throughout the sequence, he maintains a smile and looks slightly to his left, shifting his head and facial expression subtly while continuing to talk. Small logos are visible on the screen, including one that says "DONE RIGHT" and another that reads "PROPERLY FIT". The background remains static, showing a variety of wall-mounted pictures and apparel on hangers, while the man's movements are limited to his head and mouth as he engages in a conversation.
